title: assaracus capax
side_effects: Assaracus capax can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged consumption of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and stomach pain. In rare cases, improper use of Assaracus capax may cause cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat, high blood pressure, and even heart failure. It's essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant to avoid these potential side effects.
